projects.title: BossBoard
projects.description: A collaborative task management and productivity board application. Features include real-time updates, drag-and-drop task organization, and team collaboration tools.

projects.title: Web Calculator
projects.description: A modern, responsive web calculator with advanced mathematical functions, history tracking, and a clean user interface.

projects.title: Teamnote03
projects.description: A collaborative note-taking and team documentation platform. Enables teams to create, share, and manage notes in real-time.

projects.title: Digital Stopwatch
projects.description: A feature-rich digital stopwatch with lap timing, split times, and precision countdown functionality.
